Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Heart (The Elder Empire: Sea)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Heart has been found.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — A gray-green heart pulses at the center of a network of veins and tendons in the crater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Heart is an object that the Consultants are after.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Heart may want to be bonded with a human.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — The Heart is an object that arrived on the island recently.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor's successor is fighting over the Dead Mother's Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Calder is looking for the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Heart is a concept or object that may be getting closer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Heart is a valuable object.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
